documentation.file_docstring: Gmail Watcher Service Automatically starts `gog gmail watch serve` when the gateway starts, if hooks.gmail is configured with an account.
inline_comments: Check if gog binary is available
Start the Gmail watch (registers with Gmail API)
Spawn the gog gmail watch serve process
Start the Gmail watcher service. Called automatically by the gateway if hooks.gmail is configured.
Check if gmail hooks are configured
Set up Tailscale endpoint if needed
Start the Gmail watch (register with Gmail API)
Wait a bit for graceful shutdown
Check if the Gmail watcher is running.

functions.doc: Start the Gmail watcher service.   Called automatically by the gateway if hooks.gmail is configured.

functions.doc: Check if the Gmail watcher is running.
